title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BEL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BEL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BEL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About BEL:
BEL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL!
